channel.title: Notation on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Notation on Frank Huang

item.title: Docker commands
item.description: start a container run a container with volume: #create a volume docker volume create <volume-name> #inspect the volume info docker volume inspect <volume-name> # run it! docker run --detach --name hellow/world -v <volume name>:<directory in container> volume can even specify a volume driver for differnec

item.title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
